args.code:
import json

def categorize_article(title, description):
    title = str(title).lower()
    description = str(description).lower()
    if "sport" in title or title.find("sport") != -1 or "sports" in title or title.find("sports") != -1 or "sport" in description or description.find("sport") != -1 or "sports" in description or description.find("sports") != -1:
        return "Sports"
    elif "business" in title or title.find("business") != -1 or "economy" in title or  title.find("economy") != -1 or "finance" in title or title.find("finance") != -1 or "business" in description or description.find("business") != -1 or "economy" in description or description.find("economy") != -1 or "finance" in description or description.find("finance") != -1:
        return "Business"
    elif "science" in title or  title.find("science") != -1 or "technology" in title or title.find("technology") != -1 or "computer" in title or title.find("computer") != -1 or "research" in title or title.find("research") != -1 or  "medical" in title or title.find("medical") != -1 or "science" in description or description.find("science") != -1 or "technology" in description or description.find("technology") != -1 or "computer" in description or description.find("computer") != -1 or "research" in description or description.find("research") != -1 or  "medical" in description or description.find("medical") != -1:
        return "Science/Technology"
    elif "world" in title or title.find("world") != -1 or  "politics" in title or title.find("politics") != -1 or "government" in title or title.find("government") != -1 or "world" in description or description.find("world") != -1 or  "politics" in description or description.find("politics") != -1 or "government" in description or description.find("government") != -1:
        return "World"
    else:
        return None

def process_articles(articles, metadata):
    science_count = 0
    total_count = 0
    bad_articles = []
    for article in articles:
        try:
            article_id = int(article.get("article_id", 0))
        except (TypeError, ValueError) as e:
            bad_articles.append(article)
            continue

        is_in_metadata = any(article_id == item for item in metadata)

        if is_in_metadata:
            try:
                category = categorize_article(article["title"], article["description"])
            except Exception as e:
                bad_articles.append(article)
                print(f"Error categorizing article {article_id}: {type(e)}, {e}")
                continue
            if category == "Science/Technology":
                science_count += 1
            total_count += 1
    print(f"Bad articles: {bad_articles!r}")
    return science_count, total_count

metadata_results = json.loads(var_tool_query_db_Fsb9nPHaaaq7RgcwLOvi["query_db_response"]["result"])
var_metadata = [int(row.get("article_id",0)) for row in metadata_results if row.get("article_id") is not None]

var_articles = json.loads(var_tool_query_db_X1gZlfd2wrOydIwiHYtG["query_db_response"]["result"])
science_count, total_count = process_articles(var_articles, var_metadata)

if total_count > 0:
    fraction = float(science_count) / float(total_count)
else:
    fraction = 0.0

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps({"fraction": fraction}, indent=4))
